name: 吐槽型（現代穿越專屬）
description: 穿越女主用現代思維和語言吐槽古代事物或系統設定，製造時空反差的喜劇效果。這類對白是穿越劇的標誌性元素。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: One can of formula costs 100 points. You capitalist... Mia? What kind of name is that? I'm asking you, can I buy on credit?... I think he's just impotent. Otherwise, why would I have given him medicine?
